synthesis.driver: Global supply glut and soft demand outweigh escalating US-Iran strikes, pushing Brent lower.
synthesis.based_on: Asian stocks are mixed and oil prices slip after Iran and US launch fresh attacks

takes.asian stocks are mixed and oil prices sl: Oil slips as oversupply caps price despite fresh US-Iran attacks.
takes.us launches strikes on iran for second n: US-Iran strikes escalate, but oversupply limits upward price pressure.
takes.iran war latest trump claims tehran call: Talks hint at de-escalation, but oversupply keeps prices subdued.
takes.indonesia gets first russian oil shipmen: Russian oil to Indonesia adds to global oversupply, pressuring prices downward.
takes.stolt nielsen stays profitable as strait: Hormuz uncertainty fades as global glut dominates price direction.
